name: ai-agent-toolkit
description: AI agent toolkit - Claude Code plugins by gigamori

plugins.name: taskflow
plugins.description: Concurrent task progress and context management across Claude Code sessions

plugins.name: rule-inject
plugins.description: Enforce external rule file reading via PreToolUse deny, driven by CLAUDE.md <rules when="..." src="..."/> tags. Runs on Claude Code and Cursor.

plugins.name: role-mode
plugins.description: Cognitive-mode harness: declares Role and Mode for each turn via slug-based prompt injection (mode:<name>), with strict NEVER/DO rules.
